description: Style Note A season style essential, the most important accessory for the cosmopolitan man - the wallet! belmonte comes up with this stylish wallet, crafted from genuine leather and fashioned to hold your cards, money and other knick knacks carefully. Buy now before stocks run out! Product Details Black leather wallet with two main compartments, has brown piping Two card holders and a slip pocket on the left fold and a zippered pocket and a slip pocket on the right Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight Size Dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cm
